name: getFileContent
description: Fetch the raw text content of a previously generated file by its URL. Use this to read source files before making targeted edits — read the file, apply the change, then write it back with getFile (overwrite: true). Binary files (images, PDFs, ZIPs) are rejected. Maximum file size: 512 KB.

url.description: Absolute http/https URL of the file to read. Must point to a text file (source code, markdown, JSON, etc.).
